projects.title: Grid Collapse
projects.description: An ordered grid dissolving into randomness across a noise-warped front — after Tyler Hobbs' 'structure from randomness'.

projects.title: Differential Growth
projects.description: A closed line that grows, repels itself and folds into organic coral-like boundaries. Animated; R reseeds.

projects.title: Flow Ribbons
projects.description: Non-overlapping flow-field ribbons with variable-scale zones, turbulence regions and crisp polygon edges — after Tyler Hobbs' Fidenza.

projects.title: Watercolor
projects.description: Pigment blooms from stacked, Gaussian-deformed polygons — after Tyler Hobbs' watercolor-polygon method.

projects.title: Particle Life
projects.description: Life-like clustering from a seeded species×species attraction matrix. Tune it live; R for a new universe.

projects.title: Flow Field
projects.description: Particles advected through a Perlin-noise vector field. Live params + reproducible seed.
